nasb.text: But whoever does not fall down and worship shall immediately be cast into the midst of a furnace of blazing fire.”

esv.text: And whoever does not fall down and worship shall immediately be cast into a burning fiery furnace.”

cnv.text: 凡不俯伏下拜的，就必立刻扔在烈火的窯中。”

ccb.text: 不叩拜的人必立刻被抛进烈焰熊熊的火窑。’”
